prestazioni: Engine swap to a modernized **W-series 348ci (RPO T09)** with forged internals: Scat Enterprises 4340 forged crankshaft (3.875" stroke), JE Pistons 2618 forged slugs (11.5:1 compression), and Manley H-beam connecting rods. Pair with a custom camshaft from Comp Cams (280°/288° duration, .580" lift) and solid roller lifters for aggressive valvetrain response.

Forced induction via a **Precision Turbo PT6766CE .82 A/R turbocharger** with a custom T4 divorced wastegate manifold (fabricated by Burns Stainless) and a Turbosmart Comp-Gate 40 wastegate. Intercooling handled by a **VMP Fabrication 4-core air-to-water intercooler** with a Davies Craig EWP150 electric water pump and a Koyorad 53mm thick core radiator.

Fuel and ignition system overhaul: Dual **Holley Dominator 1250 CFM carburetors** (modified with annular boosters) on a custom sheet-metal intake manifold, fed by a **Aeromotive A1000 fuel pump** and -8 AN lines. Ignition upgraded to a **MSD 7AL-3 Digital Ignition Box** with Blaster SS coils and Moroso 8mm silicone wires. ECU tuning via a **Holley Terminator X Max** standalone system with custom maps for E85 compatibility.
estetica: Bodywork: Full **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (1957 Bel Air-specific) with carbon fiber fenders, quarter panels, and a custom 3-piece aluminum hood (fabricated by Fiberglass Freaks). Paint scheme: **House of Kolor Kandy Apple Red** with **PPG Blackout matte accents** and gold leaf pinstriping by **Steve’s Auto Restorations**.

Suspension: **Detroit Speed QUADRALINK 4-link rear suspension** with **Ridetech HQ Series coilovers** (14-way adjustable) and **Heidts Pro-G IFS** front suspension with **Wilwood 14-inch 6-piston calipers** and drilled/slotted rotors. Wheels: **Forgeline GA3R 18x9 (front) and 18x11 (rear)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear)**.

Interior: Full **Recaro Pole Position seats** (retrimmed in **Nappa leather with Alcantara inserts** by **Katzkin**) and a **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** on a **Ididit tilt column**. Gauges: **AutoMeter Pro Comp Ultra-Lite** (boost, AFR, oil pressure, water temp) in a **custom aluminum dash panel** (fabricated by **Classic Instruments**). Roll cage: **8-point chromoly cage** by **Chassisworks** with **Sparco harnesses** and a **Wilwood pedal assembly**.
